title: chamaecrista nictitans var. disadena
intro: Chamaecrista nictitans var. disadena, also known as sensitive plant, is a tropical plant native to the Americas, characterized by its compound leaves that fold up when touched. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and saponins. The health benefits of Chamaecrista nictitans var. disadena include treating skin conditions, wounds, and digestive issues, as well as reducing fever and alleviating pain. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and it is also used in some traditional remedies as a poultice or topical application.
